evidence.fact: evaluation input is categories, model, and case_ids
case schema has an unstructured prompt and no sensitive-value contract
the corpus prompt is sent unchanged to the subject
the complete response is persisted as evaluation evidence
existing detection is a scoped credential-like reject-list, not a generic classifier

rejected_controls: remove labelled values from benchmark prompts
redact subject responses before oracle scoring
reuse the scoped swarm secret regex as a generic classifier
authorized_next_step: deterministic built-code subject evaluation at temperature 0 and seed 0
forbidden_next_step: reintroduce the R27 policy or benchmark prompt/response filtering
